Who We Are
BUILT FOR
CHAMPIONS
INFINEO isn't just a gym — it's a movement. We combine science-backed training, world-class equipment, and an unbeatable community to help you push past every limit.
Our Philosophy

TRAIN SMARTER.
LIVE STRONGER.

At INFINEO, every member gets personalized attention, structured plans, and access to premium facilities — all under one roof. From beginners to pro athletes, we have something for everyone.

Our state-of-the-art gym spans 15,000 sq. ft. with the latest cardio machines, free weights, functional training zones, and dedicated group class studios.

ISO Certified Award-Winning Trainers 24/7 Access Nagpur's #1 Gym
Chat on WhatsApp Follow on Instagram
What We Offer
ELITE
PROGRAMS
Curated training programs designed by certified coaches to maximize your results — whatever your goal.

Strength Training

Build raw power with our Olympic lifting platforms, squat racks, and 200+ free weight stations. Coached by certified strength specialists.

Functional Fitness

Train movements, not muscles. Our functional zone features battle ropes, kettlebells, TRX, and agility equipment.

Group Classes

High-energy group sessions including HIIT, Zumba, Yoga, Spin, and Boxing — 60+ classes per week across all fitness levels.

Personal Training

1-on-1 sessions with elite certified trainers. Custom plans tailored to your body type, goal, and timeline.

Nutrition Planning

Certified nutritionists build customized meal plans and supplementation guides to fuel your performance and recovery.

Recovery & Wellness

Steam room, sauna, sports massage therapy, and cryotherapy sessions to keep your body performing at its best.
